title: anagallis monelli subsp. collina
intro: Anagallis monelli subsp. collina, also known as blue pimpernel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Anagallis monelli subsp. collina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
